assets.name: ENEMY_ScrapperAutomaton_Blockout_LOD0
assets.role: Compact melee worker-machine with hunched boiler torso, oversized claw arms, and broad piston feet.
assets.pivot: Origin at ground footprint center. Keep +Y up, +Z forward; place melee hit sockets at claw palms.
assets.collider: Primary capsule 0.85m diameter x 1.55m height, centered near Y 0.78. Add optional trigger boxes on claw arcs during attack frames.
assets.lod: LOD1 can remove rivets, shoulder gear teeth, and backpack bends. LOD2 should collapse claws to simple mitts and replace cylinders with six-sided rods.
assets.rig: Root, pelvis, boiler/spine, head visor, left/right cog shoulder, elbow, wrist/claw, hip, knee, ankle, backpack exhaust controls.
assets.animation: Idle pressure bob, scuttle walk, claw windup, double swipe, stagger, shutdown with furnace core dim.

assets.name: ENEMY_LancerAutomaton_Blockout_LOD0
assets.role: Tall ranged automaton with narrow body, stilt piston legs, and a pressure lance/cannon extending forward.
assets.pivot: Origin at ground footprint center. Barrel points +Z; muzzle socket should be placed at lance tip.
assets.collider: Primary capsule 0.70m diameter x 2.05m height. Use separate narrow raycast origin/muzzle transform for projectile or hitscan.
assets.lod: LOD1 can reduce lance supports and backpack pipes. LOD2 keeps only torso, head, legs, and one barrel cylinder for combat readability.
assets.rig: Root, hips, torso, neck/head, shoulder braces, lance aim/recoil bone, hip/knee/ankle pistons, backpack hose controls.
assets.animation: Idle aiming sway, brace legs, charge pressure pulse, fire recoil, vent steam, stagger, collapse.

assets.name: ENEMY_SentinelTurret_Blockout_LOD0
assets.role: Static sentinel turret with floor, wall, and ceiling mounting cues in one universal blockout.
assets.pivot: Origin at floor mount center for default placement. For wall/ceiling variants, duplicate mesh later and move pivot to mount plate center.
assets.collider: Use a cylinder or box for base/housing and a short non-blocking barrel trigger. Avoid mesh collision.
assets.lod: LOD1 removes gear teeth and side drums. LOD2 is a box housing plus single barrel; static batching is recommended.
assets.rig: No full character rig required. Use separate yaw base and pitch barrel transforms; optional recoil child for muzzle.
assets.animation: Search sweep, target acquire snap, fire recoil, overheat vent, destroyed droop.

assets.name: PART_CogShoulderJoint_Blockout
assets.role: Reusable cog shoulder or hip joint with readable gear teeth and rivet rhythm.
assets.pivot: Origin centered on axle. X axis runs through socket for shoulder placement.
assets.collider: No gameplay collider; visual only unless used as a weak-point hit target.
assets.lod: Bake gear teeth to normal map or collapse to 10-sided cylinder for LOD2.
assets.rig: Parent under upper-arm or shoulder bone; rotate around local X.
assets.animation: Can counter-rotate subtly during idle/walk to sell clockwork motion.

assets.name: PART_PistonLeg_Blockout
assets.role: Reusable piston leg assembly with hip mount, brass knee socket, telescoping lower rod, and broad metal foot.
assets.pivot: Origin remains at floor center for preview. For production rigging, pivot hip block at upper socket.
assets.collider: Character capsule handles collision; optional footstep contact box only for VFX/audio timing.
assets.lod: Remove knee sphere rivets and simplify lower rod to box at distance.
assets.rig: Hip, knee, ankle, and piston stretch helper bones.
assets.animation: Use IK for planted foot and piston compression on step impact.

assets.name: PART_BrassMaskVisor_Blockout
assets.role: Reusable enemy face plate with cream enamel mask, brass cheek hinges, snout filter, and dark visor slit.
assets.pivot: Origin is under the mask for preview. Production pivot should sit at neck/head joint center.
assets.collider: Head hitbox can be simple box matching mask silhouette.
assets.lod: At LOD2, keep the visor slit as dark/emissive material strip and merge hinges into the mask body.
assets.rig: Parent to head bone; optional jaw/filter bob during venting.
assets.animation: Small visor pulse or filter shake during alert/firing states.

assets.name: PART_FurnaceCore_Blockout
assets.role: Reusable glowing amber furnace core/weak-point insert with brass retaining ring.
assets.pivot: Origin at core center. Forward-facing ring is +Z.
assets.collider: Optional sphere trigger 0.45m diameter for weak-point tests.
assets.lod: LOD1 can become flat emissive disc; LOD2 can bake glow into torso material.
assets.rig: Usually parented to torso; scale pulse helper optional.
assets.animation: Low-amplitude glow pulse, damage flare, shutdown dim.

assets.name: PART_PipeBackpack_Blockout
assets.role: Reusable boiler backpack with tank, paired vertical pipes, exhaust bends, and mount collar.
assets.pivot: Origin centered on tank. For production, pivot at spine mount plate.
assets.collider: Visual only; use character capsule unless backpack is intended as targetable silhouette.
assets.lod: LOD1 removes pipe bends; LOD2 merges tank and pipes into a single low-sided hull.
assets.rig: Parent to spine/torso. Exhaust outlets need sockets for steam VFX.
assets.animation: Idle vent puffs, overheat shake, burst steam on death.
